fingerprint_vendors.description: Client-side fingerprinting and anti-bot vendors: Fingerprint Pro, open-source FingerprintJS CDN, DataDome, PerimeterX/HUMAN, Sift, Forter, ThreatMetrix/TransUnion, Iovation, Kasada (cdn + primary API), Sardine, Shape Security/F5, Castle.io, GeeTest, BotGuard/Blackwall. Includes current Fingerprint CDN/API domains, api.fpjs.pro, api.fpjs.io, npm loader CDN, HUMAN sensor/connect hosts, Sift JS/CSP plus api.sift.com hosts, Kasada primary API domain kasada.net, and persistent transport resource types.

captcha_vendors.description: CAPTCHA / device-attestation vendors (Arkose Labs, FunCAPTCHA, DataDome response pages under captcha-delivery.com, and Cloudflare Turnstile / Challenge Platform under challenges.cloudflare.com). Connection-oriented rules include websocket and webtransport resource types. DISABLED BY DEFAULT — blocking these will break logins on sites that use them as CAPTCHA or device-check challenges (X signup, Roblox, several crypto exchanges, Cloudflare-protected forms, some enterprise SSO flows).
